scenarios.description: Adding an unrelated source file preserves existing graph facts
A comment-only edit preserves semantic expectations
A safe authored-fixture rename remains valid and incrementally equivalent
Moving a module and rewriting its import remains valid
Introducing an equivalent import alias remains valid
Reordering independent class declarations remains valid
Adding an intentional clone remains valid and reproducible
Editing one clone across the threshold remains valid and reproducible

operation.to:
def normalize_secondary(value: str) -> str:
    payload = value.encode("utf-8")
    digest = payload.hex()
    return digest[::-1]
